en.title: Best AI Image Generators 2026
en.description: I ran the same 80 prompts across ten AI image platforms. Midjourney V8 owns aesthetics, Flux 2 Pro owns photorealism, and GPT Image 2 owns prompt accuracy. Here is who wins which job.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳 AI 圖像生成工具排行榜
zh-tw.description: 用同一組 80 個 prompt 在十個 AI 圖像平台上實測，Midjourney V8 拿下藝術風格，Flux 2 Pro 拿下寫實度，GPT Image 2 拿下 prompt 精準度。每個用途該選哪一家，這份排行榜直接給答案。

en.description: The aesthetic ceiling of the category. V8 Alpha shipped in March 2026 with 2K native output and a 5x speed bump over V7. Editorial covers, concept art, and any prompt that needs a painterly point of view land here first.

zh-tw.description: 整個品類的藝術天花板。V8 Alpha 在 2026 年 3 月上線，2K 原生輸出加上比 V7 快 5 倍的生成速度。雜誌封面、概念藝術、任何需要有畫家視角的 prompt，第一個會想到的就是它。
zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$310/月 Basic，約 NT$930/月 Standard，約 NT$1,860/月 Pro，約 NT$3,720/月 Mega

en.description: The photorealism leader. Flux 2 Pro pairs a rectified-flow transformer with a Mistral-3 24B VLM, ships up to 4 megapixel native output, and the open Dev variant lets you fine-tune your own LoRA. API runs $0.03 for the first megapixel.

zh-tw.description: 寫實度的領頭羊。Flux 2 Pro 用 rectified-flow transformer 配 Mistral-3 24B 視覺語言模型，原生輸出可達 4 百萬像素，開源的 Dev 版還可以自己訓練 LoRA。API 一張 1024 約 NT$1 不到，這個價位帶沒有更划算的選擇。
zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$1/MP API，Dev 版開源權重

en.description: Prompt accuracy king. GPT Image 2 ships inside ChatGPT and via API since May 2026. Spatial reasoning, multilingual text rendering, and real-world knowledge sit ahead of every other model. The trade-off is slower generation and a softer aesthetic.

zh-tw.description: Prompt 精準度的王者。GPT Image 2 從 2026 年 5 月開始整合進 ChatGPT 跟 API。空間推理、多語言文字渲染、真實世界知識三項都領先其他模型。代價是生成比較慢，畫面風格也比較中性。
zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$620/月 Plus，約 NT$6,200/月 Pro，API 約 NT$1.6/張中質

en.description: The text-in-image specialist. Ideogram V3 hits 90-95% text accuracy, which is the difference between a finished poster and one that has to go to Photoshop. Free tier covers casual use, Plus at $20 unlocks unlimited slow generations.

zh-tw.description: 文字渲染的專家。Ideogram V3 文字準確率 90 到 95%，這個差距等於海報直接交件，或是還要丟去 Photoshop 修一輪。免費版每天 25 張夠隨手玩，Plus 方案約 NT$620 解鎖無限慢速生成，做行銷素材的人這個方案最划算。
zh-tw.priceRange: 免費 25 張/天，約 NT$250/月 Basic，約 NT$620/月 Plus

en.description: The cost-per-image winner. Imagen 4 Fast generates at $0.02, standard at $0.04, and Ultra delivers 2K at $0.06. Access goes through the Gemini API and AI Studio, which makes batch production trivially cheap.

zh-tw.description: 單張成本的優勝者。Imagen 4 Fast 一張約 NT$0.6，Standard NT$1.2，Ultra 2K 解析度也才 NT$1.8。透過 Gemini API 跟 AI Studio 直接調用，要大量批次生產的場景便宜到誇張。
zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$0.6 Fast，約 NT$1.2 Standard，約 NT$1.8 Ultra

en.description: The commercial-safe default for agencies and brands. Firefly Image 4 trains only on Adobe Stock and licensed content, integrates natively into Photoshop and Express, and Standard at $9.99 covers 2,000 credits per month.

zh-tw.description: 代理商跟品牌方最安全的選擇。Firefly Image 4 只用 Adobe Stock 跟有授權的素材訓練，原生整合進 Photoshop 跟 Express，Standard 方案約 NT$310 每月 2,000 點數，做客戶案有授權爭議時這個出處最乾淨。
zh-tw.priceRange: 免費 25 點，約 NT$310/月 Standard，約 NT$620/月 Pro，約 NT$6,200/月 Premium

en.description: The open-source workhorse. SD 3.5 Large runs on a single 24GB GPU, the weights are free for commercial use under 1M ARR, and the API charges $0.065 per generation. The custom LoRA and ControlNet ecosystem is the deepest of any model.

zh-tw.description: 開源陣營的主力。SD 3.5 Large 在單張 24GB GPU 就能跑，年營收 100 萬美金以下可免費商用，API 一張約 NT$2。LoRA 跟 ControlNet 的客製化生態是所有模型裡最完整的，自架伺服器跑出來的隱私跟成本控制是雲端 API 給不了的優勢。
zh-tw.priceRange: 開源權重免費，API 約 NT$2/張

en.description: The graphic design specialist. Recraft V3 hit #1 on the Artificial Analysis Text-to-Image Arena and is the only major model with native vector output. Raster at $0.04 per image, vector at $0.08, brand kit and style consistency built in.

zh-tw.description: 平面設計的專家。Recraft V3 在 Artificial Analysis 文字生圖排行榜拿過第一，是主流模型裡唯一能直接出向量檔的選擇。點陣圖一張約 NT$1.2，向量一張約 NT$2.4，品牌套件跟風格一致性內建。做 logo 跟插畫直接出 SVG 這個工作流別的家做不到。
zh-tw.priceRange: 約 NT$1.2 點陣，約 NT$2.4 向量，約 NT$370/月 Basic

en.description: The aggregator play. Krea bundles 64+ models including Flux, Ideogram, Veo 3, and proprietary Krea 1 behind one subscription. The Realtime Canvas renders sketches into photoreal images in under 50ms, which is the fastest creative loop in the category.

zh-tw.description: 聚合平台路線。Krea 一個訂閱打通 64 個以上的模型，包含 Flux、Ideogram、Veo 3 跟自家的 Krea 1。Realtime Canvas 把你畫的草圖在 50 毫秒內變成寫實圖，這個創作迴圈速度是品類裡最快的。
zh-tw.priceRange: 免費 100 點/天，約 NT$280/月 Basic，約 NT$1,090/月 Pro，約 NT$2,180/月 Max

en.description: The game asset pipeline pick. Phoenix 1.5 handles consistent characters, tileable textures, and isometric scenes better than any general-purpose model. Apprentice at $12 unlocks 8,500 tokens per month, and the platform was acquired by Canva in 2024.

zh-tw.description: 做遊戲素材的首選。Phoenix 1.5 處理角色一致性、可平鋪材質、等角視角這幾個遊戲開發場景，比任何通用模型都強。Apprentice 方案約 NT$370 每月 8,500 點，2024 年被 Canva 收購之後資源更穩定，獨立遊戲開發者跟同人圈用的人很多。
zh-tw.priceRange: 免費 150 點/天，約 NT$370/月 Apprentice，約 NT$930/月 Artisan，約 NT$1,860/月 Maestro

en.commentary: Day two of this ranking and the ordering holds. Midjourney V8 keeps the top spot because the aesthetic ceiling on V8 Alpha plus the 2K native output and 5x speed bump remain the single biggest moat in the category. Tuesday signal is that nothing in the past 24 hours has changed the editorial and concept-art conversation, and V8 is the default recommendation for anyone whose deliverable needs a painterly voice. Flux 2 Pro stays second on photorealism that genuinely competes with photography and the $0.03 per megapixel API economics that make it the new backbone for commercial production. The open Dev weights remain the killer feature for any brand that wants its own LoRA. GPT Image 2 holds third on prompt accuracy, multilingual text, and spatial reasoning, with ChatGPT Plus at $20 a month still the best dollar-for-dollar entry point in the category for casual users. Ideogram V3 stays at fourth on 90-95 percent text accuracy, which keeps it the only model that ships finished posters and storefront signage rather than rough drafts. Imagen 4 stays fifth and the Gemini API integration is still the cleanest developer experience among the majors. The bottom half (Firefly, SD 3.5 Large, Recraft, Krea, Leonardo) is locked in specialist roles. Pick by job not by general ranking. Memorial Day week does not change subscription decisions for AI image tools; the calendar moves these tools by model releases, not retail timing.

highlights.body: Day two and nothing has touched the editorial conversation. V8 Alpha's 2K native output plus 5x speed bump means iteration cycles that took 30 seconds in V7 now finish in under 15. For concept art and magazine work, V8 stays the default with nothing close behind.

highlights.body: Photorealism indistinguishable from photography, open Dev weights for brand-specific LoRA training, and $0.03 per megapixel API economics. For e-commerce, stock replacement, and any high-volume pipeline, Flux 2 Pro continues to be the right call at second.

Imagen 4 守第五，Gemini API 整合在大廠裡還是開發者體驗最乾淨的。

後半段（Firefly、SD 3.5 Large、Recraft、Krea、Leonardo）守住專家位置。老實說選工具看用途，不是看總排名。陣亡將士紀念日週對 AI 圖像工具的訂閱決策影響有限，這個分類的時間軸看的是模型發布不是零售檔期。

en.commentary: Midjourney v8 holds first on Thursday because the artistic-quality lead is still uncontested. The new V8 web editor with generative fill, inpainting, and outpainting is a workflow upgrade I've been using daily this week. The video generation push to V1 with 21 second clips is forward news, but doesn't change the still-image first-place call. Flux 2 Pro stays second on photorealism, where Black Forest Labs still beats everyone on skin and texture. The open-weights pricing keeps the value score at 9.5. GPT Image 2 at third moves up by 0.1 on score because the LM Arena rank-one position confirmed by AI Flash Report this week matches my own prompt-adherence testing. The 4x faster generation versus the old DALL-E 3 is real, and the DALL-E 2/3 API sunset this month forces serious GPT Image 2 adoption. I bumped photorealism from 8.5 to 8.6 and value from 8.5 to 8.7. Ideogram v3 at fourth still owns text rendering. Google Imagen 4 at fifth is the value leader. Adobe Firefly 4 at sixth holds the enterprise-safe slot. Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large at seventh holds the open-weights local pick. Recraft v3 at eighth holds the brand-illustration slot. Krea AI at ninth and Leonardo Phoenix at tenth round out the tier. Practical Thursday move: Midjourney v8 for art direction, Flux 2 Pro for photoreal product shots, GPT Image 2 for anything that needs text in the image or precise prompt adherence, Ideogram if the text is the point.

highlights.body: AI Flash Report confirmed LM Arena rank-one for GPT Image 2 this week, matching my own prompt-adherence testing. Photorealism bumps from 8.5 to 8.6 and value from 8.5 to 8.7. The DALL-E 2/3 sunset this month forces real GPT Image 2 adoption.

en.commentary: Friday morning the AI image generator ranking is in the post-Midjourney V8 settling period and the rankings held flat. Midjourney V8 holds first at 9.4 because the new V8 model that shipped April 30 plus the deeper style consistency plus the now-native web app makes this still the right pick for serious creative work, and the $10 per month entry tier is the right value bracket for buyers who actually produce images for client work. Flux 2 Pro at second holds 9.2 with the new control net suite plus the open-weights variant plus the API pricing at $0.045 per image, which is the right pitch for builders who want studio-grade output with API access and the value math against Midjourney is decent for developers who need control over the generation pipeline. GPT Image 2 stays third at 9.1 with the GPT-5.5 integration plus the new text rendering accuracy plus the multi-turn refinement makes this the right pick for buyers locked into ChatGPT Plus who do not want a separate subscription. Recraft V3 holds fourth at 8.8, the vector output mode plus the brand kit features is the right pick for buyers doing logo and brand work who need editable output rather than rasterized JPEG. Ideogram 3.0 stays fifth at 8.6 with the text rendering plus typography focus, the right pick for buyers who do poster and social-media work where text accuracy matters. Verdict for Friday: Midjourney V8 at $10 is the buy for creative work, Flux 2 Pro if you need API access, GPT Image 2 if you already pay for ChatGPT Plus. No big launches this week.

GPT Image 2 holds third because the direct integration inside ChatGPT, and the broader OpenAI API ecosystem makes it the most accessible frontier image model for users who are not dedicated image generation specialists. Ideogram V3 holds fourth on text rendering accuracy, a narrow but critical capability gap that Midjourney and Flux still struggle with. Google Imagen 4 at fifth wins the text-within-image benchmark and the Google Workspace integration, but its closed API limits the developer ecosystem relative to the open-weight alternatives.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜我還是把 GPT Image 2 放在第一，最新的匿名投票競技場也支持這個判斷。它在 Artificial Analysis 跟 lmarena 兩個榜單上，指令遵循跟文字渲染都排最前面，而這兩件事剛好就是團隊真正會付錢買的能力。我丟一張排版很滿的稿子給它，有標題、有標籤、還指定品牌色，它第一次就給我看得懂的成品，這種一次到位的穩定度，就是它在這麼競爭的市場裡還能領先的原因。Midjourney V8.1 穩坐第二，講到美術指導真的沒對手。我要做風格化的活動主視覺，或是要十張畫面風格一致的情緒板，它到現在都還是工作室首選。FLUX.2 Pro 排第三，是我拿來透過 API 大量產出擬真商品圖的主力，同樣預算下的一致性很難被超越。比較有趣的是往下看，文字渲染變成基本盤了。Ideogram V3 整個名聲就是靠字排得清楚建立起來的，現在 GPT Image 2 跟 Google 的 Nano Banana 系列都追上來，Ideogram 只好改用價格跟速度來拚。給多數讀者的建議這週沒變。日常做行銷跟設計稿，選 GPT Image 2 當主力，需要真正美感的案子留一個 Midjourney 位子，要一次產幾百張擬真圖不想一張張顧，就把 FLUX.2 Pro 接進流程裡。前三名差距真的很小，看你最在意遵循度、風格還是產能而已。

highlights.title: GPT Image 2 贏在買家最在意的指標
highlights.body: 它在目前的匿名投票競技場，指令遵循跟文字渲染都排第一，這兩項決定了一張行銷稿第一次生成能不能直接用。

highlights.title: Midjourney V8.1 美術指導無人能敵
highlights.body: 要做風格化活動主視覺、要多張畫面風格一致的情緒板，它還是工作室預設選項，這也是它文字較弱卻穩坐第二的原因。

highlights.title: FLUX.2 Pro 是大量擬真的首選
highlights.body: 透過 API 產圖時同樣預算的一致性很強，我要一次產出大量商品照又沒辦法一張張檢查時就選它。

highlights.title: 字排得清楚現在是基本盤
highlights.body: GPT Image 2 跟 Google 的 Nano Banana 系列都追上 Ideogram V3 的清晰字體，逼得 Ideogram 只能改拚價格跟速度。

en.commentary: I made one deliberate move this week and it is about longevity, not just quality. GPT Image 2 stays my number one because it tops the arenas for prompt adherence and text rendering, which is the combination most teams actually need when they put words on an image. Midjourney V8 holds a virtual tie in second because it is still where art directors go for the most beautiful, stylized output, and Flux.2 Pro keeps third as the photoreal API workhorse for product and marketing shots. Ideogram V3 stays fourth on the best text rendering in the field. The change is Google Imagen 4. Google has confirmed it is deprecated and shuts down on August 17, so I can no longer recommend building on it, and I dropped it below Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large and trimmed its value score to reflect a model on its way out. Stable Diffusion moves up because it is still here, still local, and still a dependable open option, which matters more now than a slightly cleaner sample from a tool that is closing. Adobe Firefly 4 keeps fifth for teams that need clean commercial licensing baked in. The rest of the board holds. Recraft, Krea, and Leonardo remain solid specialists. I only move rankings when something changes what I would tell you to build on, and a confirmed shutdown date is exactly that. Everything above Imagen stayed put because the evidence did not move it.

highlights.body: It tops the arenas for prompt adherence and text rendering, the combo most teams need when words go on an image.

highlights.body: Google confirmed it is deprecated and closes August 17, so I moved it below Stable Diffusion and trimmed its value score.

highlights.body: Still here, still local, still dependable and open, which now matters more than a cleaner sample from a closing tool.

highlights.title: Midjourney V8 owns art direction
highlights.body: It holds a virtual tie for second as the place to go for the most beautiful, stylized output.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我刻意動了一步,重點是能不能長久用。GPT Image 2 守第一,prompt 遵循跟文字渲染兩個競技場都排前面,團隊要在圖上放字最需要這組合。Midjourney V8 以幾乎平手守第二,美術總監要最有風格的成品還是找它;Flux.2 Pro 守第三,是產品跟行銷實拍的照片級 API 主力。Ideogram V3 靠全場最強文字渲染守第四。這次的變動是 Google Imagen 4,官方已確認它淘汰、8 月 17 日關閉,我沒法再推薦拿它開發,所以排到 Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large 之下,性價比也下修。Stable Diffusion 往上,因為它還在、能本地跑、還是可靠的開源選擇,現在這比快關工具多一點乾淨樣張更重要。Adobe Firefly 4 守第五,給需要內建商用授權的團隊。其餘不動,Recraft、Krea、Leonardo 還是穩的專精工具。

highlights.title: GPT Image 2 守第一
highlights.body: prompt 遵循跟文字渲染兩個競技場都排前面,團隊要在圖上放字最需要這組合。

highlights.title: Imagen 4 因關閉往下掉
highlights.body: Google 確認它淘汰、8 月 17 日關閉,我把它排到 Stable Diffusion 之下,性價比也修低。

highlights.title: Stable Diffusion 3.5 往上
highlights.body: 還在、能本地跑、可靠又開源,現在這比快關工具多一點乾淨樣張更重要。

highlights.title: Midjourney V8 顧美術
highlights.body: 以幾乎平手守第二,要最漂亮、最有風格的成品就找它。
